calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Set For Case Management Conference On Jan-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq. of the Law Office of Robert F. Cohen, Tel. 800.492.2657, appearing specially for the plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC.'s Motion For Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Attorney Fees. Defendant Stephanie Sivongsay aka Stephanie S. Sivongsay is ordered to serve on plaintiff within twenty (20) days from the date of this order full and complete responses to plaintiff's requests for admission. If defendant fails to comply it is the court's order that all facts and documents referred to in said requests of admission will be deemed admitted for all purposes in this litigation. Sanctions in the amount of $430.00 is assessed against defendant with payment to be made within ten (10) days from the date of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Continued To Apr-23-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
